chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1861 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 07.12.2016. Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Malik, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G a/w SIP Nusrat Ali Baloch ASHO P.S Kotri. = Despite notice respondent No.1 is called absent. ASHO of P.S Nusrat is present and states that he will ensure that petitioner is not harassed by the respondent No.4. This petition is disposed of with the directions that respondent No.4 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner and if he at all has any genuine grievance, then he is at liberty to seek his legal remedy. Copy of this order will be served on respondent No.4-Younus S/o Muhammad Yaseen by the ASHO present today in Court and he will submit a compliance report to the Additional Registrar of this Court within 10 days from today. JUDGE Shahid
